effects_provenance.raw: Clementine - THCA Flower - Greenhouse Top Cut 14 GRAMS Clementine – Sativa-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain Clementine is a sativa-dominant hybrid celebrated for its vibrant citrus aroma featuring sweet tangerine and orange notes layered over subtle earthy undertones. This strain offers an energizing and uplifting experience paired with refreshing flavors. Type: Sativa-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain for Energy and Creativity As a sativa-dominant hybrid, Clementine provides an invigorating cerebral boost combined with gentle physical relaxation. It is ideal for enhancing focus, creativity, and mood throughout the day. Clementine Terpene Profile – Citrus, Sweet, and Earthy Aromas The primary terpenes are: Limonene: Bright citrus scent known for mood elevation and stress relief. Pinene: Fresh pine aroma that supports alertness and memory retention. Myrcene: Earthy and herbal notes promoting relaxation without sedation. Terpinolene: Floral and herbal undertones enhancing focus and mental clarity. These terpenes blend to create Clementine’s signature sweet citrus aroma with refreshing earthy and floral nuances. Effects of Clementine – Energizing Mental Clarity with Light Physical Relaxation Clementine sparks an uplifting cerebral energy that improves focus and creativity, balanced by mild physical relaxation that eases tension without clouding the mind. This combination makes it a great choice for daytime use and social activities. Enjoy the bright flavor and dynamic effects of Clementine — a sativa-dominant hybrid crafted to invigorate your body and sharpen your mind. CALM CARYOPHYLLENE FOCUSED LIMONENE MYRCENE NC INVENTORY nostalgia Out of stock retail flower Sungrown UPLIFTED UPLIFTING Gold Standard

effects_provenance.raw: Lemon Cherry Gelato – THCa Flower Size: 14g, Quantity:: 1 Pack Premium THCa Hemp Flower Lemon Cherry Gelato Strain (Indica Dominant) 35.6% Total THCa 100% Naturally Grown 3rd Party Lab Tested Federal Farm Bill Compliant *** We do not ship to California. *** Lemon Cherry Gelato THCA Flower Lemon Cherry Gelato THCA flower delivers one of the most sought-after profiles in hemp-derived cannabis: dense, frost-coated buds with a sweet cherry-citrus aroma and a smooth, dessert-like finish. Each batch is indoor-grown, hand-trimmed, and third-party lab-tested so you know exactly what’s in the jar before it ships. Lemon Cherry Gelato Strain Profile Lemon Cherry Gelato, often shortened to “LCG” is a slightly indica-dominant hybrid (roughly 60% indica / 40% sativa) created by crossing Sunset Sherbet with Girl Scout Cookies . That pairing is responsible for its standout looks: chunky, conical buds that run from deep green to flashes of purple, blanketed in trichomes. Spec Detail Strain type Indica-dominant hybrid (~60/40) Lineage Sunset Sherbet × Girl Scout Cookies THCA content See current COA (listed on product) Dominant terpenes Caryophyllene, Limonene, Myrcene Grow Indoor, hand-trimmed Aroma & Flavor The name is the tasting note. Lemon Cherry Gelato leads with bright lemon and ripe cherry, rolls into sweet berry and creamy gelato, and finishes with a faint earthy-pine undertone. The limonene-forward terpene profile is what gives it that citrus-candy top note, while caryophyllene adds a subtle peppery depth on the exhale. Effects & What to Expect As an indica-leaning hybrid, Lemon Cherry Gelato is generally enjoyed as a relaxed, easygoing strain, mellow and unwinding without being heavy at moderate amounts. Many users reach for it in the evening or on a low-key day off. As with any THCA flower, start low and go slow to find your own comfortable amount. Lab Results (COA) Every batch of our Lemon Cherry Gelato THCA flower ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) from an accredited third-party lab, confirming cannabinoid content and screening for pesticides, heavy metals, and microbials. You can view the current COA on this product page before you buy. Transparency is the standard for everything we grow. How Lemon Cherry Gelato Compares If you like LCG, you’ll likely enjoy our other dessert-and-fruit hybrids. Gelato 42 THCA Flower shares the creamy Gelato backbone, while Animal Runtz THCA Flower brings a sweeter, candy-forward prof

effects_provenance.raw: Sharpiez THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Sharpiez THCA Flower is a potent hybrid built on a stacked pedigree: Permanent Marker crossed with Zoap . The cross combines two of the loudest modern strains into a single connoisseur-grade cultivar — dense buds, heavy trichome coverage, and a pungent, gas-edged aromatic profile that's instantly recognizable in the jar. Effects Sharpiez hits hard. The cerebral onset is fast and intense, settling into deep body relaxation that earns its top-shelf reputation. Expect heightened creativity, pronounced euphoria, and serious decompression. Best paired with downtime, evening use, or any setting where intensity and flavor character are the appeal. Flavor & Aroma On the nose: pungent gas and ink-like funk up front, with a sweet-and-soapy middle and a warm earthy finish on the exhale. Smoke is full, complex, and unmistakably loud. The terpene profile reads gas-and-funk with sweet undercurrents — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Sharpiez harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Sharpiez THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Sharpiez THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Gas hybrid Soap Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Watermelon Pines CBD THCa Flower 1g - Type 2 THCa Shop for Watermelon Pines CBD THCa Flower Watermelon Pines is a rare type 2 strain with an exotic terpene profile and balanced cannabinoid content. Bred from Tang × Capulator’s Strawberry Pines, this hybrid brings together juicy watermelon notes with a whisper of pine—flavors typically found in high-THCa strains. Indoor grown and packed with full-spectrum flavor, Watermelon Pines stands out from the crowd. Experience one of the most unique CBD + THCa flowers yet. Watermelon Pines Strain Highlights Type: Hybrid (Type 2: Balanced CBD/THCa) Parent Strains: Tang × Strawberry Pines (Capulator) Flavors: Bold watermelon, sweet fruit, pine Aroma: Juicy, fruity, fresh with light herbal notes Effects: Uplifting, clear-headed, smooth THCa - 3.6% CBD - 8.68% What is Watermelon Pines Strain? Watermelon Pines is one of the most flavorful and complex flowers in our catalog. As a type 2 strain, it offers a near-balanced mix of THCa and CBD, designed for those seeking full-body relief with a functional headspace. This flower delivers watermelon-heavy flavor that’s typically found in high-THCa cultivars, paired with a fresh pine finish. The high is clean and clear—uplifting without racing—making it a great choice for daytime focus or mellow social settings. Watermelon Pines Strain Cannabinoids THCa : 3.6% CBD : 8.68% Delta 9 THC - 0.3% Total Cannabinoids : 12.03% Watermelon Pines Strain Terpenes Caryophyllene Pinene Limonene Watermelon Pines THCa + CBD Effects Expect a smooth combination of clarity and calm: Bright headspace without heaviness Gentle body ease from CBD balance Crisp flavor that elevates the senses Great for day use, mild stress, or creative flow Type Hybrid – balanced with both energy and relaxation Why Choose Hemp Hop for Watermelon Pines? Hemp Hop specializes in terpene-rich type 2 flowers grown with care and precision. Watermelon Pines is: Indoor-grown from exclusive in-house genetics Cold-cured to preserve complex flavors Lab-tested for safety, potency, and compliance A standout choice for hybrid CBD + THCa experiences Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full High THCa Flower collection. OR... 👉Check out our CBD Hemp flower collection for a SMOOTHER vibe. Caryophyllene Day Delta-9 THC Evening Hybrid Indoor Limonene no-oregon Pinene tag__sale_3% THCa tag__sale_8% CBD tag__sale_HYBRID

effects_provenance.raw: Passion Fruit THCa Weight: 14g Passion Fruit THCa tests at 31.49% THCa, a sativa leaning hybrid that packs a tropical punch with bright, get-up-and-go energy. The effects arrive as a crisp cerebral lift that sharpens focus and puts a shine on the morning. That energy builds into a creative, talkative high that makes tasks flow and conversations easy. It settles into a light, feel-good buzz with a gentle body ease that never drags you down. It’s the perfect strain for daytime sessions, getting things done, and sunny afternoons outside. 31.49% total THCa 31.54% total cannabinoids Sativa Dom. effects_provenance.raw: Jack Herer THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Jack Herer THCa Flower Strain Jack Herer Indoor THCa Flower is a world-famous sativa-dominant strain named after the legendary cannabis activist and author. Bred by crossing Haze with Northern Lights #5 and Shiva Skunk, this uplifting cultivar delivers a burst of creative energy, mental clarity, and a flavor that’s as bold as its legacy. From award-winning genetics to vibrant citrus-pine flavor, Jack Herer is your go-to for motivation and mood. Shop premium sativa flower now at Hemp Hop. Jack Herer THCa Flower is a celebrated sativa known for its energizing and thought-provoking high. This strain kicks in right after the exhale, filling your mind with motivation, euphoria, and crystal-clear focus. It’s perfect for daytime use, whether you're working on a creative project, running errands, or catching up with friends. Conversations flow easily, ideas spark quickly, and the overall mood is light and elevated. Jack Herer Strain Cannabinoids THCa: 29.45% Total Cannabinoids: 31.05% Jack Herer Strain Terpenes Total Terpenes - 4% Terpinolene Ocimene Pinene Limonene Jack Herer THCa Effects Expect an energetic, clear-headed experience: Elevates mood and mental focus Sparks creativity and conversation Provides a motivating, clean sativa buzz Great for daytime productivity or social settings Type Sativa-Dominant Hybrid – ideal for morning and daytime use Phenotype Jack Herer buds are large and pepper-shaped with neon green hues and golden undertones. Thick orange hairs run through the nugs, coated in amber crystal trichomes that sparkle under the light. Why Choose Hemp Hop for Jack Herer Strain? At Hemp Hop, we bring legendary strains to life with top-tier cultivation and full-panel lab testing. Our Jack Herer THCa Flower is: Grown in small batches for purity and flavor Hand-trimmed and carefully cured for terpene retention Lab-tested for potency, safety, and compliance It’s everything a true sativa should

effects_provenance.raw: Richboy Runtz THCA Flower 28g / Supreme Strain Profile Richboy Runtz THCA Flower is a luxurious hybrid that builds on the legendary Runtz lineage with an even louder, more decadent twist. The cultivar produces dense, frost-coated buds with an aromatic profile bursting with tropical fruit, candy sweetness, and creamy vanilla layered over a subtle gassy undertone. Effects Richboy Runtz delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of decadent character that distinguishes premium Runtz crosses. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: juicy berries up front, with citrus candy through the middle and a smooth dessert-rich finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably layered. The terpene profile reads fruit-candy-and-vanilla — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Richboy Runtz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Richboy Runtz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Richboy Runtz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Berry Candy Citrus hybrid THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Cherry Pie THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Cherry Pie THCA Flower is a legendary, Indica-dominant hybrid that has long been celebrated as a staple in elite West Coast genetics. A masterfully crafted cross between the heavy-hitting Granddaddy Purple and the classic Durban Poison, this cultivar is a visual and aromatic masterpiece. The buds are remarkably dense and chunky, showcasing a rich tapestry of deep forest greens woven with vibrant streaks of midnight purple. Coated in a dense, sticky forest of silvery-milky trichomes and wrapped in short, fiery orange pistils, this high-potency flower looks just as sweet and rich as its name implies. Effects Cherry Pie delivers a fast-acting, beautifully balanced experience that provides the best of both its legendary parent strains. It begins with a bright, euphoric burst of mental clarity that instantly lifts the mood, melts away stress, and sparks a relaxed, creative mindset. Before long, the heavy Indica lineage takes over, sending a warm, soothing physical relaxation radiating through the body. It completely relaxes muscles and eases physical tension without causing immediate, heavy sedation, making it the perfect choice for late afternoon unwinding, social creative sessions, or enjoying a cozy evening at home. Flavor & Aroma True to its namesake, Cherry Pie offers a deeply nostalgic and savory-sweet sensory journey that mimics a freshly baked dessert. Opening the container fills the room with a loud, intoxicating aroma of tart, overripe cherries and sweet berries, perfectly rounded out by a rich, doughy pastry undertone and a hint of earthy spice. The smoke is exceptionally smooth and velvety on the palate; on the inhale, you are treated to a mouth-watering flavor of sweet cherry glaze, while the exhale reveals a complex, lingering finish of toasted crust, subtle herbal spice, and a classic skunk sweetness. Lab Tested — View the COA Download the Cherry Pie THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for the available laboratory report. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Co

effects_provenance.raw: Apples and Bananas - THCA BULK Flower - Greenhouse 1/4 Pound Apples and Bananas – Sativa-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain Apples and Bananas is a sativa-dominant hybrid celebrated for its sweet and tropical aroma featuring vibrant notes of fresh apples and ripe bananas. This strain offers a flavorful and refreshing taste with energizing and creative effects. Type: Sativa-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain for Uplifting and Motivating Effects As a sativa-dominant hybrid, Apples and Bananas provides a lively cerebral high that enhances creativity and focus while delivering a subtle physical relaxation. It’s an excellent choice for daytime activities that require mental clarity and motivation. Apples and Bananas Terpene Profile – Sweet, Tropical, and Fruity Aromas The primary terpenes are: Limonene: Bright citrus aroma uplifting mood and reducing stress. Myrcene: Earthy and musky notes that encourage gentle relaxation. Pinene: Fresh pine scent which supports alertness and mental sharpness. Terpinolene: Herbal and floral undertones adding complexity to the aroma. These terpenes blend to create Apples and Bananas’ distinctive sweet fruit aroma complemented by herbal and piney accents. Effects of Apples and Bananas – Energizing Mental Clarity with Light Body Ease Apples and Bananas offers an invigorating cerebral uplift that fosters creativity and focus paired with mild body relaxation to ease tension without drowsiness. This makes it ideal for boosting productivity and social engagement throughout the day. Experience the vibrant aroma and energizing effects of Apples and Bananas — a sativa-dominant hybrid designed to awaken your mind and refresh your body. CALM CARYOPHYLLENE FOCUSED LIMONENE MYRCENE Sungrown UPLIFTED UPLIFTING Gold Standard

Lemon Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid that combines Mint GSC, Lemon Haze, and Sunset Sherbet. The bud features a distinct lemon and blueberry aroma, with earthy and woody notes on each exhale. Lemon Gelato produces a buzzing mental high that gradually descends into a relaxed state of euphoric bliss. Lemon Cherry Gelato High THCa Hemp Flower is a cross from the famous strains Sunset Sherbet and Girl Scout Cookies! It is a 60/40 indica dominant hybrid type 1 hemp flower. This Lemon Cherry Gelato is indoor grown and blesses the user with a wave of euphoric relaxation and an increased sense of excitement.
